canonical_definition: A benchmark and dataset of 2,000 ambiguous questions with condition-answer-citation triples, designed to evaluate models' ability to resolve ambiguity through explicit condition identification and conditional answer generation.

definitions.text: A benchmark and dataset of 2,000 ambiguous questions with condition-answer-citation triples, designed to evaluate models' ability to resolve ambiguity through explicit condition identification and conditional answer generation.

relationships.evidence: Using CondAmbigQA, we develop an experimental protocol to evaluate models on both condition identification and conditional answer generation. (Introduction)

characterization: A benchmark and dataset of 2,000 ambiguous questions with condition-answer-citation triples, designed to evaluate models' ability to resolve ambiguity through explicit condition identification and conditional answer generation.
